post.description:
Create Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Create a new Project.

 Required permission:
   - `project.create`

get.description:
Get Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Returns the project identified by the requested ID.

 Required permission:
   - `project.read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the project.

schema.title: id
schema.description: The unique identifier of the project.

post.description:
Update Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Update an existing project.

 Required permission:
   - `project.write`

projectRoleAssertion.title: project_role_assertion
projectRoleAssertion.description: Enable this setting to have role information included in the user info endpoint. It is also dependent on your application settings to include it in tokens and other types.

projectRoleCheck.title: project_role_check
projectRoleCheck.description: When enabled Zitadel will check if a user has a role of this project assigned when login into an application of this project.

hasProjectCheck.title: has_project_check
hasProjectCheck.description: When enabled Zitadel will check if the organization of the user, that is trying to log in, has a grant to this project.

privateLabelingSetting.title: private_labeling_setting
privateLabelingSetting.description: Define which private labeling/branding should trigger when getting to a login of this project.

delete.description:
Delete Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Delete an existing project.
 In case the project is not found, the request will return a successful response as
 the desired state is already achieved.

 Required permission:
   - `project.delete`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the project.

schema.title: id
schema.description: The unique identifier of the project.

post.description:
List Projects

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all matching projects. By default all projects of the instance that the caller has permission to read are returned.
 Make sure to include a limit and sorting for pagination.

 Required permission:
   - `project.read`

Deactivate Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Set the state of a project to deactivated. Request returns no error if the project is already deactivated.
 Applications under deactivated projects are not able to login anymore.

 Required permission:
   - `project.write`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the project.

schema.title: id
schema.description: The unique identifier of the project.

post.description:
Activate Project

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Set the state of a project to active. Request returns no error if the project is already activated.

 Required permission:
   - `project.write`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the project.

schema.title: id
schema.description: The unique identifier of the project.

post.description:
Add Project Role

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Add a new project role to a project. The key must be unique within the project.

 Required permission:
   - `project.role.write`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

roleKey.title: role_key
roleKey.description: The key is the only relevant attribute for Zitadel regarding the authorization checks.

group.title: group
group.description: The group is only used for display purposes. That you have better handling, like giving all the roles from a group to a user.

post.description:
Update Project Role

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Change a project role. The key is not editable. If a key should change, remove the role and create a new one.

 Required permission:
   - `project.role.write`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

parameters.name: role_key
parameters.description: The key is the only relevant attribute for Zitadel regarding the authorization checks.

schema.title: role_key
schema.description: The key is the only relevant attribute for Zitadel regarding the authorization checks.

group.title: group
group.description: The group is only used for display purposes. That you have better handling, like giving all the roles from a group to a user.

delete.description:
Remove Project Role

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Removes the role from the project and on every resource it has a dependency. This includes project grants and user grants (role assignments).

 Required permission:
   - `project.role.write`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

parameters.name: role_key
parameters.description: The key is the only relevant attribute for Zitadel regarding the authorization checks.

schema.title: role_key
schema.description: The key is the only relevant attribute for Zitadel regarding the authorization checks.

post.description:
List Project Roles

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Returns all roles of a project matching the search query.

 Required permission:
   - `project.role.read`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

parameters.name: pagination.offset
parameters.description: Starting point for retrieval, in combination of offset used to query a set list of objects.

schema.title: offset
schema.description: Starting point for retrieval, in combination of offset used to query a set list of objects.

parameters.name: pagination.limit
parameters.description:
limit is the maximum amount of objects returned. The default is set to 100
 with a maximum of 1000 in the runtime configuration.
 If the limit exceeds the maximum configured Zitadel will throw an error.
 If no limit is present the default is taken.

schema.title: limit
schema.description:
limit is the maximum amount of objects returned. The default is set to 100
 with a maximum of 1000 in the runtime configuration.
 If the limit exceeds the maximum configured Zitadel will throw an error.
 If no limit is present the default is taken.

parameters.name: pagination.asc
parameters.description:
Asc is the sorting order. If true the list is sorted ascending, if false
 the list is sorted descending. The default is descending.

schema.title: asc
schema.description:
Asc is the sorting order. If true the list is sorted ascending, if false
 the list is sorted descending. The default is descending.

parameters.name: sortingColumn
parameters.description: The field the result is sorted by. The default is the creation date. Beware that if you change this, your result pagination might be inconsistent.

schema.title: sorting_column
schema.description: The field the result is sorted by. The default is the creation date. Beware that if you change this, your result pagination might be inconsistent.

parameters.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

post.description:
Create Project Grant

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Grant a project to another organization.
 The project grant will allow the granted organization to access the project and manage the authorizations for its users.
 Note: Authorization in this context refers to role assignments, not to OAuth authorization.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.create`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

grantedOrganizationId.title: granted_organization_id
grantedOrganizationId.description: Organization the project is granted to.

roleKeys.title: role_keys
roleKeys.description: Keys of the role available for the project grant.

post.description:
Update Project Grant

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Change the roles of the project that is granted to another organization.
 The project grant will allow the granted organization to access the project and manage the authorizations for its users.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.write`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

parameters.name: granted_organization_id
parameters.description: Organization the project is granted to.

schema.title: granted_organization_id
schema.description: Organization the project is granted to.

roleKeys.title: role_keys
roleKeys.description: Keys of the role available for the project grant.

delete.description:
Delete Project Grant

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Delete a project grant. All user grants (role assignments) for this project grant will also be removed.
 A user will not have access to the project afterward (if permissions are checked).
 In case the project grant is not found, the request will return a successful response as
 the desired state is already achieved.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.delete`

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project.

schema.title: project_id
schema.description: ID of the project.

parameters.name: granted_organization_id
parameters.description: Organization the project is granted to.

schema.title: granted_organization_id
schema.description: Organization the project is granted to.

post.description:
Deactivate Project Grant

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Set the state of the project grant to deactivated.
 Applications under deactivated projects grants are not able to login anymore.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.write`

parameters.description: ID of the project.

Activate Project Grant

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Set the state of the project grant to activated.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.write`

post.description:
List Project Grants

 Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under project service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Returns a list of project grants. A project grant is when the organization grants its project to another organization.

 Required permission:
   - `project.grant.read`

limit is the maximum amount of objects returned. The default is set to 100
 with a maximum of 1000 in the runtime configuration.
 If the limit exceeds the maximum configured Zitadel will throw an error.
 If no limit is present the default is taken.

projectRoleAssertion.title: project_role_assertion
projectRoleAssertion.description: Enable this setting to provide role information to your application. For OpenID Connect, the roles can be requested from the UserInfo endpoint or sent in the ID or Access Token, based on your application's configuration.

authorizationRequired.title: authorization_required
authorizationRequired.description: Deny authentication if the user has no authorization assigned to this project. Authorizations to the project without assigned a specific role to the user are allowed.

projectAccessRequired.title: project_access_required
projectAccessRequired.description: Before a user can be authenticated, it is verified that their affiliated organization has been granted access to this project. Authentication is not permitted for users from unauthorized organizations.

deletionDate.title: deletion_date

The timestamp of the deletion of the project grant.

 In case the deletion occurred in a previous request, the deletion date might be empty.

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

google.protobuf.Any.description: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message.

tags.name: zitadel.project.v2beta.ProjectService
tags.description:
Service to manage projects.

 Deprecated: use project service v2 instead. This service will be removed in the next major version of ZITADEL.
